summary: Validated requested admin refactor mainly via static review plus web runtime smoke. TypeScript and web export pass, required public/shortcut routes exist, but runtime is blocked by missing Supabase env (supabaseUrl is required), preventing authenticated/visual end-to-end confirmation.

critical.issue: Backend API testing could not run because /app/backend service/tests are not present in this workspace while testing_type was both.

ui_bugs.issue: Web runtime crashes before UI rendering with 'supabaseUrl is required' from src/services/supabase.ts createClient initialization.

integration_issues.issue: Could not fully validate interactive visual behavior (sidebar active indicator, metrics interactions, segmented control behavior, switches spacing, save actions) because app fails at startup without EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.

action_items: Provide EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in preview runtime to unblock UI testing.
After env fix, rerun full UI e2e on admin routes to confirm visual requirements in runtime (not only static code).

Keep routing map cleanup as follow-up: legacy /(admin) files still contain old dialog-based/deprecated implementations in same file after `export default ...Experience` (dead code risk, maintainability concern).
critical_code_review_comments: Requested route fixes are present: /app/src/app/admin/barbers.tsx redirects to /(admin)/team; public aliases /salon/[slug] and /salon/[slug]/booking are defined.
Admin neutral theme implementation is consistent in new experience components: accent/text use dark neutral (#18181B/#171717) and admin buttons use variant 'admin'.
Dynamic establishment color appears intentionally in Settings public preview and public salon pages; no leakage found in new admin experience components during static review.
WatermelonDB reactive patterns remain in place (observe/query usage) across admin experience screens.

Maintainability issue: route files under /(admin) keep large legacy implementations below `export default ...Experience`; this dead code includes browser dialogs and can confuse future changes despite not being active export.
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md. No test accounts provided; plus required Supabase env keys are missing, blocking authenticated validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Build health is green (`yarn tsc --noEmit`, `yarn build:web`). Runtime still fails before rendering with supabaseUrl missing. Once env keys are provided, prioritize runtime verification of admin visual acceptance criteria and route behavior under authenticated state.
rca of the issue: Repro: open web root (127.0.0.1:3000) -> Expo overlay shows 'supabaseUrl is required' at src/services/supabase.ts createClient call. Root cause: eager client creation with empty env variables. Mitigation: provide env keys in preview and/or guard/lazy init to avoid hard crash when env is absent.
